overview: A fully functional police entrance exam practice system with 4 progressive-difficulty exams (400+ questions), timed testing, answer review, attempt tracking, category performance dashboard, and badge progression system. All data persisted in browser localStorage with mobile-friendly design.
features: 4 full exams with 100+ questions each (Easy to Hard/Elite)
Timed exams with visible countdown and auto-submit
Badge system: Rookie, Ready, Academy Bound, Top Candidate
Randomized question and answer order toggles
